reason: The previous report selected women with Sex == 0 even though the legacy NHANES data uses 1=male and 2=female.
The previous report evaluated data associated with the trained model rather than an independent protected test set.
The previous sentinel FNR ratio of 999 was not a valid fairness statistic.
current_interpretation: No fairness conclusion can be drawn from the removed metrics.
required_for_valid_conclusion: A retrained model evaluated once on an independent test cohort with subgroup uncertainty.
